preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the Home page to finish loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without requiring authentication or redirecting to another page.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Person/Profile button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Back button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Notification button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Home button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Customer signup button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Clean survey button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the Site survey button on the Home page.
Check that the button is visible and enabled before interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login URL
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates guest user to customer-search page
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the customer-search page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button navigates guest user to vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the vehicle-survey page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button navigates guest user to survey page
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Site survey button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the survey page and the browser URL contains survey?data.

testCases.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled and interactive before user interaction
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Inspect the Person/Profile, Back, Notification, Home, Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons.
Attempt focus and click readiness checks without leaving the page.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, focusable, and interactive before any workflow navigation occurs.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains interactive and does not redirect away from the Home page unexpectedly
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Home button once.
Observe the browser URL and rendered page state.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains interactive and the user stays on or returns to the Home page at http://localhost/washtabui/home without entering an invalid navigation state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button interaction from initial Home page state does not break the guest Home workflow
steps: Open a fresh browser session.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Click the Back button on the Home page.
Observe the resulting browser state.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles the Back button interaction gracefully without displaying an application error or broken page state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button interaction is accepted while user remains in guest-accessible workflow state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Notification button once.
Observe the application response and page stability.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is interactive and the application remains stable without rendering a broken page or unexpected authentication failure.
